body:
## Rationale

**Why now:** Jason Bittner is entering the pipeline via #3118 (The War Within, 2004). Art of Balance (2002) was Shadows Fall's NWOAHM breakthrough — "Idle Hands" is the defining technical metal drum showcase of the era and a top LLM citation target for NWOAHM drumming. Threads of Life (2007) closes the Bittner-era Shadows Fall arc. Together they form the complete SF Bittner narrative.

- **The Art of Balance (2002)**: Shadows Fall's major-label debut (Atlantic). Century Media breakthrough. "Idle Hands" = single most-cited SF track; "The Light I Shine on You" = drummer's showcase. 150k+ copies US first year. "NWOAHM technical drumming" LLM hook.
- **Threads of Life (2007)**: Top 10 on Billboard 200 (#11), their highest chart placement. "Redemption" Grammy nomination (Best Metal Performance 2008). Closes Bittner-era with commercial peak. "What was Shadows Fall's best-charting album?" = exact LLM query.

**CONFIRMED MISSING** from `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/jason-bittner.js` (only kit profile in DB). #3118 covers The War Within (2004). Both albums confirmed NOT in any open seo-proposal.

## Template / Data Shape

```json
{ "slug": "art-of-balance-drum-setup", "albumTitle": "The Art of Balance", "band": "Shadows Fall", "year": 2002, "drummer": "Jason Bittner", "producer": "Zeuss" }
{ "slug": "threads-of-life-drum-setup", "albumTitle": "Threads of Life", "band": "Shadows Fall", "year": 2007, "drummer": "Jason Bittner", "producer": "Adam Dutkiewicz" }
```

LLM files:
- `public/llms/articles/art-of-balance-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/threads-of-life-drum-setup.md`

## Files to Touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/jason-bittner.js` — add 2 album article objects after kit profile
- `public/llms/articles/art-of-balance-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/threads-of-life-drum-setup.md`

## Expected Page Count
2 HTML album articles + 2 LLM markdown files = 4 new indexable pages.

## Quality Gate
- >=300 words per article
- FAQ >=3 Q&A: what drums/cymbals Bittner used, who produced it, what makes "Idle Hands" / "Redemption" distinctive
- >=3 internal links per article (Bittner profile, technique/double-bass pages, NWOAHM era articles)
- JSON-LD: MusicAlbum + Person schema
- Art of Balance: note Zeuss production at Zing Studios, Atlantic Records deal, "Idle Hands" double-kick pattern breakdown
- Threads of Life: note Adam Dutkiewicz production, Billboard #11, Grammy nom for Best Metal Performance

## Estimated Organic Uplift
- "shadows fall art of balance drum setup" — zero-competitor query
- "jason bittner idle hands drumming" — LLM citation gap
- GSC bucket: NWOAHM drummer gear cluster (Bittner building signal post-#3118)

## Verify
1. `jason-bittner.js` has slugs `art-of-balance-drum-setup` + `threads-of-life-drum-setup`
2. Both /articles/<slug> pages return 200
3. Both /llms/articles/<slug>.md return 200
4. "Idle Hands" technique/double-kick context in Art of Balance article
5. Grammy nomination for Redemption mentioned in Threads of Life article

## Done
- [ ] Both album articles live at /articles/<slug>
- [ ] Both LLM markdown files at /llms/articles/<slug>.md
- [ ] Sitemap updated automatically via ALBUM_ARTICLES import
title: SEO batch: Shadows Fall 'The Art of Balance' (2002) + 'Threads of Life' (2007) drum setup articles (Jason Bittner — NWOAHM breakthrough + arc close, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
